title: ProcessingStartedPayload
description: Payload for PROCESSING_STARTED (eventVersion 1), published to aidefense.processing-events by apps/vision-service's commands consumer on receipt of MISSION_PROCESSING_REQUESTED. Phase 3 (PRD-Phase-3 REQ-3.13) published only missionId as a stub; Phase 4 (PRD-Phase-4 REQ-4.10) adds the optional video-metadata fields below, populated once REQ-4.6's extraction runs and before frame iteration begins. Additive per ADR-005 — no eventVersion bump.

durationSeconds.description: Source video duration in seconds, derived from frameCount/fps (REQ-4.6). Omitted by consumers/producers still on the Phase 3 stub shape.

width.description: Source video frame width in pixels (REQ-4.6).

height.description: Source video frame height in pixels (REQ-4.6).

frameCount.description: Total frame count reported by the video container, per REQ-4.6's metadata pass (not yet verified against the real per-frame iteration count, which ProcessingCompletedPayload.frameCount carries once iteration finishes).

checksumSha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the source video file (REQ-4.6), stable across re-uploads under a different MinIO object key.
